inline_comments.message:
Tested below changes. PSB output for same. DistributionManagement duplicated and added from sdc main pom.

Without distributionManagement in POM before change
[ERROR] Failed to execute goal org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-deploy-plugin:2.7:deploy (default-deploy) on project activity-spec: Deployment failed: repository element was not specified in the POM inside distributionManagement element or in -DaltDeploymentRepository=id::layout::url parameter -> [Help 1]

After adding distributionManagement in POM with change
[ERROR] Failed to execute goal org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-deploy-plugin:2.7:deploy (default-deploy) on project activity-spec: Failed to deploy artifacts: Could not transfer artifact org.openecomp.activityspec:activity-spec:pom:1.2.0-20180329.064316-1 from/to ecomp-snapshots (https://nexus.onap.org/content/repositories/snapshots/): Failed to transfer file: https://nexus.onap.org/content/repositories/snapshots/org/openecomp/activityspec/activity-spec/1.2.0-SNAPSHOT/activity-spec-1.2.0-20180329.064316-1.pom. Return code is: 401, ReasonPhrase: Unauthorized. -> [Help 1]
